calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Plaintiffs Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Mansingh Chouhan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Craig S. Miller, Esq. appeared with plaintiff David Jennings, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mansingh Chouhan.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on September 10, 2018.
Substitute service of defendant Mansingh Chouhan occurred on September 24, 2018, and was effectuated on October 5, 2018.
Default as to defendant Mansingh Chouhan was entered on November 6, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff David Jennings, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mansingh Chouhan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,760.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,760.63.
Costs - $900.62.

Total - $46,421.25.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
